note: The same CHIKN_CROSS_FRONTEND_FAIL_ON_REPAIR=1 env that originally proved the bug (Swift writer pass triggered orphan repair of 16 docs at GPT's initial audit) now passes on this branch: 16 docs, 3 top-level nodes, no repair. Swift ChiknKitChecks fixture 'rust canonical hierarchy tags survive Swift metadata write' asserts three sub-properties: canonical Folder tag loads, canonical Document tag stays under folder, canonical Document path loads. Validation workflow now exports CHIKN_CROSS_FRONTEND_FAIL_ON_REPAIR=1 so future regressions fail CI rather than emitting silent repair log lines. Rust harness now fingerprints document ancestry+id+path and requires both writer passes to preserve the Rust-converter baseline exactly.
